mechanisms.description: For user-context operations — User Access Token
mechanisms.refresh_token: Rotating — old refresh token invalidated on each refresh

mechanisms.requires: Published public integration in Zapier App Directory

rate_limits.error_on_exceed: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests — 60 second cooldown
rate_limits.notes: Rate limited by whichever occurs first: IP or Partner level

error_dictionary.solution: Check request body format and required parameters
Refresh token via /oauth/token. Access tokens expire after 10 hours. Refresh token is rotating — store new one each time
Wait 60 seconds (cooldown). Implement exponential backoff. Distribute requests across IPs if possible
Retry with backoff. Check status.zapier.com for outages

community_constraints.issue: Rotating refresh tokens — old one invalidated after use
community_constraints.workaround: Always store the NEW refresh token from each refresh response. Never reuse old refresh tokens

community_constraints.issue: Only published apps can use App Access Token flow
community_constraints.workaround: Use User Access Token (OAuth) for development. Can't use App Access Token until app is published in Marketplace

use_cases: Trigger Zaps programmatically from external systems
Monitor Zap run history for error handling
Create and manage Zaps via API
